rationale: Educ. Code §7.004 governs the Texas Education Agency sunset review process. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The Texas Education Agency is subject to Chapter 325, Government Code (Texas Sunset Act). Unless continued in existence as provided by that chapter, the agency is abolished September 1, 2029.
_note: Rule text concerns TEA sunset provisions; proposed change to homestead exemption amount is unrelated.
